name: skylence-codex
description: Codex companion for the Skylence toolchain: skyline-friendly judge-design skills, bundled MCP server definitions, and a SessionStart steering hook for Skylence development.

interface.shortDescription: Skylence skills and MCP servers for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native companion to the Skylence Claude Code plugin. It exposes the judge-design skill chain, bundled MCP server definitions, and a Codex SessionStart hook that steers sessions toward skyline-first tooling while leaving Claude-only slash commands and LSP setup out of the Codex package.
defaultPrompt: Audit this action surface for judge criteria.
Draft a judge prompt and eval cases.
Use skyline-first tools on this repo.
